entry.title: Palworld 1.0 won't wipe your data, 'but you should' says Pocketpair's publishing boss
entry.content: s announced at this year's Summer Games Fest, Palworld 1.0 arrives in less than a month. The launch version looks like it'll introduce a lot of new stuff to Pocketpair's Pokémon-inspired survival-crafting game, and with all those additions comes a question: will Palworld 1.0 require players to start again from scratch, or will you be able to carry on your adventure as normal?.. Read more.

entry.title: Screenshot Competition – The Early Years!
entry.content: Welcome to the 228th War Thunder Steam Screenshot Competition! Thanks for submitting your screenshots last week! This week's competition will examine the lower ranks, specifically I through IV. There is so much to pick from, whether you prefer to capture pre-war biplanes, late-war heavy tanks, or even some vehicles that were from after WW II. Which one is your favorite? The three most popular and three selected by us will get 300 GE. See the winners down below! Let’s begin the 228th edition of o

entry.title: Microsoft is looking to speed up development of future Elder Scrolls, Fallout, and Halo games
entry.content: The resuscitation of Xbox has begun in earnest, but there's still much to be done, and still great uncertainty: Console exclusives are back but to what extent remains unclear, and of course the "reset" for a better future will almost certainly mean putting hundreds of people out of work . And it's possible that even bigger things could happen: A new report from The Information (via Reuters ) says Microsoft is looking to shift its focus and resources to its biggest games, while simultaneously mul

entry.title: Even a fantasy game like Skyrim won't let me be a trillionaire
entry.content: The news that Elon Musk has become the world's first trillionaire, which seems like something the world definitely doesn't need, got me thinking: have I ever even played a videogame that let me be a trillionaire? I've definitely racked up millions of dollars or coins or other make-believe currency in a few games… but trillions?.. Read more.

entry.title: Over the Hill's Next Fest demo promises a stylized off-roading game for people who actually like to drive
entry.content: I was never able to get a feel for Funselektor's top-down driving game Art of Rally , or its predecessor Absolute Drift: I like rally in real life, but sliding cars around corners at screaming speeds from a weird perspective and with no tactile feedback just didn't work for me. I had higher hopes for the slower pace of the studio's upcoming Over the Hill , and after trying the demo that dropped today with the start of the Steam Next Fest, I am very happy to say that yeah, this is the one... Read

entry.title: Former Destiny 2 CM claims Bungie was 'very close to shutting its doors' before the buyout
entry.content: It's a bittersweet time for any Destiny fan, as Destiny 2 is now in stasis after its final update . Hell, even This Week In Destiny, my weekly ritual for over a decade now, is coming to an end . All good things must finish, I guess... Read more.

entry.title: S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Cost of Hope – Between Duty and Freedom
entry.content: The story of S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Cost of Hope revolves around the long-burning conflict between the Duty and Freedom factions. Two iconic rivals, who see the Zone differently — as a danger to humanity, and as a gift to it. But how did it all start? Origins Captain Tachenko was one of the military men sent into the Zone. When he witnessed the horrifying secrets hidden within this place, he realized he could never return to the Big Land. Not before the Zone was destroyed — no matter the cost. Tachen

entry.title: Judging by how well Gothic Remake has sold, we still love eurojank
entry.content: We are still gluttons for punishment, it seems. A mere week after the launch of Gothic Remake, the RPG has already hit the 500k sales milestone, and Steam user reviews make it clear that we still love some eurojank... Read more.

entry.title: I'm sad, I'm angry, I'm interested: Destiny's final cutscenes are a painful end to a new saga cut short
entry.content: Destiny 2's Monuments of Triumph is here, the final update for the game and potentially the last Destiny anything . Even This Week In Destiny, my weekly ritual for over a decade now, is coming to an end . To that end, Bungie has crammed in as much of a conclusion as possible, given we're actually at the start of a brand-new saga... Read more.

entry.title: Odbierz darmowego Ocelota Stromberga dzięki GTA+
entry.content: Ocelot Stromberg robi na dwa etaty – jako uzbrojony samochód sportowy w stylu retro i taktyczna łódź podwodna. Do 13 lipca ten wielozadaniowy drapieżnik szczytowy jest dostępny do odebrania w salonie Automobilklubu Vinewood za darmo dla wszystkich członków GTA+. Poza tym członkowie mogą też liczyć na darmową specjalną odzież na Dzień Niepodległości USA i nie tylko. entry.title: A Decal Trophy and Discounts on Rare German Ships for German Navy Day!
entry.content: The history of the unified German navy dates back to June 14th 1848, when the short-lived “Reichsflotte” was founded. Formed in 1871, the naval forces of the German Empire quickly grew in numbers and power, and were able to compete on equal terms with Great Britain, the mistress of the seas, at the Battle of Jutland. Today, the German Navy serves as a permanent member of NATO’s naval forces. 30% discount on German ships! When: From June 12th (11:00 GMT) until June 15th (11:00). Where: Germany >

entry.title: After playing the new remake of Tomb Raider, I'm convinced you can't actually remake Tomb Raider
entry.content: Before I tell you about Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis, the second remake of a game that has also been ported and remastered more times than I can count over the last 30 years, I want to tell you about Tomb Raider, as I played it in the late 1990s. I remember it in fractured snapshots:.. Read more.

entry.title: Why do mech games rarely let you leave the cockpit? Brigador Killers devs joke that the feature 'added five years of development time'
entry.content: I love a mech game, but I especially love when a mech game lets you get out of the cockpit and just run around. It makes things feel so much less gamey , and it more fully sells the scale and power of a mech to contrast it with the perspective of a puny little human. Few games ever do it, though... Read more.

entry.title: Time to get a little sadder about Destiny 2: TWIDs are coming to an end
entry.content: Destiny 2 is ending—for all intents and purposes, in fact, it already has, with the launch earlier this week of its final update, Monument of Triumph . More than one Destiny fan at PC Gamer has described the moment as bittersweet—it's not only Destiny 2's last live service update, it's also one of its best —and in a smaller way, this is too: Maybe it's no surprise, but the clockwork-like This Week in Destiny updates will soon be over... Read more.

entry.content: Hey Steam Community! entry.title: Gothic 1 Remake is Out Now! Welcome to the Colony!

Barcelona, Spain / Vienna, Austria - June 5th, 2026: Gothic 1 Remake is available now on PC, PlayStation®5 and Xbox Series X|S, bringing one of the most beloved cult RPGs of the early 2000s back to life. entry.title: Voices of the Valley of Mines
entry.content: With Gothic 1 Remake about to release, we thought it was the perfect time to introduce you to the voices that bring the Colony to life. Take a look at the voice casts for the English, German, Polish, and Russian localizations! Whenever possible, we worked with original voice actors to preserve the authentic spirit of Gothic. At the same time, we welcomed talented performers who share a passion for the project and could help recreate the atmosphere that made the original game so memorable.

entry.title: Letni Pokaz 2026
entry.content: Przez cały tydzień oglądajcie specjalne transmisje na żywo organizowane przez wydawców i przedstawicieli branży zawierające ekscytujące ogłoszenia, aktualizacje i rozmaite doniesienia ze świata gier. entry.title: Aktualizacje powiadomień e-mail dotyczących listy życzeń

entry.title: Steamworks SDK w wersji 1.64 już dostępne
entry.content: Steamworks SDK v1.64 zostało wydane i jest dostępne do pobrania na stronie https://partner.steamgames.com/ . Podobnie jak w przypadku innych wydań Steamworks SDK, aktualizacja jest zalecana, ale nie wymagana – starsze wersje będą działać bez zarzutu. Lista zmian Ogólne Od teraz biblioteki androidarm64 łączą statycznie bibliotekę libc++. entry.title: Community Update #36 A Very Moddy Christmas
entry.content: Hello friends, The days are getting colder, the holiday decorations are creeping out early, and honestly? We’re leaning into it. It’s been a long year, one that saw Baldur’s Gate 3 receive twelve new subclasses, full cross-play support, and the arrival of photo mode - the last final, final last patch. It’s been an exciting year for us, what with also launching Larian: Channel From Hell, with weekly streams where you’ve had sneak peeks into our madness, met valued members of the team, and pushed

entry.title: Hotfix #35 Now Live!
entry.content: Hello folks, We’re dropping by to serve up a small hotfix today! Focusing mainly on improving performance, this update should resolve some crashes on consoles and address certain issues on the Steam Deck. We’ve also gone ahead and bumped the default Upscaling Type from FSR 1 to FSR 2.2 on Steam Deck Native, which should result in sharper visuals overall. entry.title: Community Update #35 Baldur's Gate 3 Turns Two

entry.content: Hello friends, how art thou? entry.title: July 23, 2025 Update
entry.content: Restored speed of the train near the end of Highway 17 to better match the original shipped difficulty. Fixed missing collision that was allowing NPCs to shoot through some walls in Entanglement. Fixed issue where Alyx could obstruct the player's path when boarding the teleporter near the end of Entanglement. NOTE: these map updates will not break existing saves but players may need to restart their current chapter if they saved after a progress blocking bug on a previous game version.

In the meantime, we’re here to help you get comfy with Patch 8, from enabling cross-play with friends across platforms to choosing the perfect new subclass for your next adventure. Today’s hotfix aims to tackle the kaleidoscope of colours that appear when changing locations, as well as various other bugs that have made their way into the game. We’re still fixing a few things, and will continue to release small hotfixes addressing bugs in the game. Please report any issues with our Support Team . Missed out on what’s new on Patch 8? Read all about it here , and tune into today’s stream as our Dark Urge ru

entry.title: Hotfix #30 Now Live!
entry.content: Hey everyone, A small hotfix is now rolling out, bringing multiple cross-play fixes and patching up some instances of crashing. Certain betentacled individuals will now be more amenable to having their picture taken – give us a smile, petal! While Patch 8 was the last major patch for Baldur’s Gate 3, we will continue to release small hotfixes addressing bugs in the game. entry.title: The Final Patch: New Subclasses, Photo Mode, and Cross-Play
entry.content: Patch 8 is now live! For the full patch notes, please click here . Well folks, This is it. Our final major game patch for Baldur’s Gate 3. You’ve helped us make BG3 a bigger success than any of us could’ve ever hoped for, and that passion could keep us tweaking things and making changes until the end of time. entry.title: Zestawienie ulubionych modów do Half-Life: Alyx
entry.content: Z racji tego, iż świętujemy pierwszą rocznicę premiery Half-Life: Alyx ( więcej informacji na ten temat znajdziecie tutaj ), pomyśleliśmy, że dobrze byłoby przyjrzeć się niektórym udanym modom stworzonym przez społeczność, które wnoszą do gry wiele życia. Poprosiliśmy Craiga Pearsona – dziennikarza, pisarza i miłośnika modów do Alyx – aby w nie zagrał i napisał kilka słów o tych, które najbardziej mu się spodobały. -- Nazywam się Craig Pearson. Pracowałem między innymi dla PC Gamera, IGN, Rock P

entry.title: Ojciec odświeżał ekran przez 13 godzin, by kupić PS5 dla dziecka
entry.content: Mieszkaniec Wielkiej Brytanii bardzo chciał kupić PlayStation 5 swojemu dziecku. Mężczyzna spędził kilkanaście godzin, odświeżając ekrany na ośmiu różnych urządzeniach. Informacja Ojciec odświeżał ekran przez 13 godzin, by kupić PS5 dla dziecka została opublikowana przez https://www.gry-online.pl/ 24 listopada 2020.

entry.title: Ruszyły zapisy do Świątecznej Bitwy Legend TFT
entry.content: W radiu już słychać pierwsze Last Christmas, a to oznacza tylko jedno - mamy zielone światło, aby startować ze Świąteczną Bitwą Legend! Ręka do góry, komu nie przyda się dodatkowa kasa na prezenty? Zapisy właśnie ruszyły, a do zgarnięcia są nagrody z puli 4 000 złotych! Informacja Ruszyły zapisy do Świątecznej Bitwy Legend TFT została opublikowana przez https://www.gry-online.pl/ 24 listopada 2020.

entry.title: W Hitmanie 3 spotkamy nawet do 300 NPC naraz; twórcy zapowiadają rewolucję w AI
entry.content: Firma IO Interactive zapowiedziała nową mapę do gry Hitman 3, a także ogłosiła, że produkcja będzie małą ewolucją, jeżeli chodzi o liczbę NPC występujących w tym samym czasie na ekranie. entry.content: Twórcy gry Cyberpunk 2077 odsłonili skrywane dotąd karty i zaprezentowali gameplay z wersji na PS4 Pro oraz PS5. entry.title: Samodzielna wersja Red Dead Online w grudniu
entry.content: Na początku przyszłego miesiąca na konsolach oraz komputerach PC zadebiutuje samodzielna wersja modułu zabawy wieloosobowej z Red Dead Redemption 2, która pozwoli bawić się w Internecie bez posiadania pełnej wersji tytułu. Do połowy lutego przyszłego roku Red Dead Online będzie sprzedawany w atrakcyjnej promocyjnej cenie. entry.content: Znamy usprawnienia FIF-y 21 na PS5 oraz XSX/S i są one naprawdę obiecujące - uwzględniają chociażby technologie wykorzystywane przez kontroler DualSense. Zmian graficznych nie zauważą natomiast posiadacze pecetowej wersji gry. entry.title: Half-Life: Alyx Update 1.5.2 released
entry.content: Changes New honorary achievement for Gnome Chompski's upcoming journey into space on Rocket Lab's "Return To Sender" mission. Content Build ID: 5850798

entry.title: Half-Life: Alyx Update 1.5.1 released
entry.content: Game Fixes Fixed a case where developer commentary would appear to turn off when continuing from an autosave generated at the start of a map Correctly display commentary panel on primary hand in single-controller mode Corrected numbering of Commentary points of interest in Processing Plant map Content Build ID: 5844889

entry.title: Aktualizacja – komentarze
entry.content: Komentarz producenta zawiera spoilery. Zalecamy ukończenie gry przed włączeniem komentarza. Jak być może pamiętacie, gdy nasz zespół pracował nad ukończeniem Half-Life: Alyx , w stanie Waszyngton zostały wprowadzone obostrzenia związane z COVID-19. Tak naprawdę znaczna część zespołu podjęła decyzję o pracy z domu jeszcze wcześniej. Czas potrzebny na przyzwyczajenie się do nowego sposobu współpracy spowodował, że chociaż udało nam się wydać grę na czas, nie byliśmy w stanie ukończyć niektórych

entry.title: Wydano aktualizację 1.4.1b do Half-Life: Alyx
entry.content: Poprawki gry Naprawiono niedawny problem zapobiegający tworzeniu lub aktualizowaniu nowych przedmiotów z warsztatu. ID kompilacji: 5292973

entry.title: Wydano aktualizację 1.4.1a do Half-Life: Alyx
entry.content: Ta aktualizacja zawiera kilka drobnych poprawek błędów odkrytych po większej aktualizacji 1.4.1 wydanej wcześniej w tym tygodniu. Poprawki gry Naprawiono błąd regresji powodujący, że hakowanie potykacza mogło doprowadzić do nieoczekiwanego zamknięcia. Od teraz menu dodatków w grze nie będzie pokazywało szablonów i niegrywalnych dodatków. Preferencje nowej gry nie są już resetowane przy powracaniu z gry do menu głównego. Wiele innych różnych poprawek nieoczekiwanych zamknięć. ID kompilacji: 51751
